terminal.commands: Available commands: whoami, video, mail, browser, text, blackjack, guide, exit

browser.title: Web Browser
browser.addressPlaceholder: Search Google or type a URL

validation.messageTooLong: Message must be 1000 characters or less

textviewer.title: README.md — Text Viewer
textviewer.defaultContent:
Welcome to the Portfolio of a Versatile All-Around Developer!

This site is a reconstructed portfolio based on developer hanaoverride's actual desktop environment. It was created to visually share the environment in which I brainstorm and develop services.

# About
Try launching apps from the bottom dock or typing commands in the terminal.

# Features
- Terminal with 7 commands + secret easter egg
- Web Browser with portfolio
- Email contact form
- Video Player
- Text Viewer (you're looking at it!)
- Blackjack game

# Tech Stack
React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand

onboarding.title: Onboarding Guide
onboarding.description: This site is a desktop OS-style portfolio. Try running various apps from the dock or menu.
onboarding.revisitDescription: You've already seen the guide. Would you like to watch it again?

1.title: Desktop Interface
1.content:
This interface follows a general Linux GUI desktop layout.
Feel free to drag or resize windows and enjoy multitasking.

2.title: Applications
2.content:
You can launch various functions through the
**top-left menu** and the **bottom dock**.

3.title: Using Terminal
3.content:
The terminal works mainly with predefined commands.
Try entering 'whoami', 'browser', 'blackjack' to see my projects.

4.title: System Panel
4.content:
The top-right panel includes a clock, calendar, weather info,
and system settings like color temperature.

5.title: Video Player
5.content:
A multimedia app where you can watch videos
featuring my activities or works.

6.title: Mail App
6.content:
A mailing application where you can leave a
message to contact me directly.

7.title: Web Browser
7.content:
Explore my full portfolio site through
the browser-style application.

8.title: Text Viewer
8.content:
A tool for viewing detailed introductions
or code snippets in text format.
